message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

    Note over MP, Lookup: Planning Scenario 'default operator information' - V1.0.0

    actor MP
    actor Lookup
    actor TO

    Note over MP, Lookup: Endpoints that could be used by the MP:
    /operator/meta
    /operator/available-assets
    /operator/stations
    /operator/regions
    /operator/operating-calendar
    /operator/operating-hours
    /operator/pricing-plans
    /operator/information

    Note over MP, Lookup: Endpoints that could be used by the MP:
    /operator/meta
    /operator/information
    /operator/regions

    Note over TO: ProcessIdentifiers: DEFAULT

    MP ->+ Lookup: e.g. /operator/available-assets
    Lookup ->+ TO: available assettypes (optionally containing assets)

    MP ->+ Lookup: e.g. /operator/meta
    Lookup ->+ TO: precise description of the implementation of the API

@enduml
